---
title: "Neighborhood characteristics with Gemini"
author: "Amanda Silva Magalhães; Alex Quistberg; Nicolás Ayobi Mendoza; Amanda Cristina de Souza Andrade; Waleska Teixeira Caiaffa"
date: today
format:
  html:
    theme: cosmo
    toc: true
    toc-location: left
    number-sections: true
    code-fold: true
    page-layout: full
execute:
  freeze: auto
  cache: true
---
